reasons: The dry run documents Level 0 and Level 1 docs-agent behavior only, with participating roles limited to read and recommendation posture.
Recommendations, curation notes, relevance observations, and recommendations-only docs update proposals are recorded without any patch plans, PR drafts, or docs-nexus mutation path.
Level 2 remains disabled in this seam, Levels 3 through 5 remain modeled disabled, and no authority guardrails are weakened.
